description_long: This is a rugged, low-cut work or hiking shoe featuring a combination of dark gray synthetic mesh and reinforced rubberized overlays for durability. The shoe has a thick, textured sole designed for traction and stability, with a visible steel toe cap for added protection. The upper includes chevron-shaped reflective accents on the sides and a padded collar with an orange inner lining for comfort. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with round, sturdy laces, and there is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The shoe appears robust and suitable for demanding urban or industrial environments. The overall design emphasizes safety, comfort, and durability.
description: A durable, dark gray work or hiking shoe with a steel toe, thick treaded sole, and reflective side accents. Features include a padded collar, orange lining, and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chevron reflective accents, thick sole, and orange inner lining.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar, heel pull tab, and the shoe's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar chevron accents and visible lacing details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the steel toe cap, lacing system, and toe box structure.
